steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Words in Context (vocabulary) question. The blank describes the creation process of the film. The decisive clues are “painstakingly,” “three years,” and “repeatedly had to invent entirely new methods and tools” — all signaling a process demanding great effort and difficulty.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘a haphazard’: “Haphazard” means random or disorganized. The text describes a meticulous, deliberate process, which is the opposite of haphazard. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘a contentious’: “Contentious” means causing controversy or conflict. The text describes a difficult but collaborative effort with no mention of dispute or argument. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘an ineffectual’: “Ineffectual” means failing to produce the intended result. The text describes a process that ultimately succeeded in producing the film Reiniger envisioned. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘an arduous’: “Arduous” means requiring great effort and endurance. This directly fits “painstakingly,” three years of work, and repeatedly inventing new tools. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
